creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
----- Forwarded message from Andreas Klemm <bits.bytes.63@googlemail.com> -----

From: Andreas Klemm <bits.bytes.63@googlemail.com>
Subject: AW: ports/107304: print/apsfilter does not print PDF to raw PostScript printers with print/acroread7 installed
To: 'Stefan Walter' <stefan@freebsd.org>
Date: Tue, 25 Nov 2008 07:07:18 +0100

Hi Stefan,

I am not actively working for FreeBSD and apsfilter anymore due to lack of
time.

For this reason my commit bit has been revoked for the time being until
I can spend time again for FreeBSD.

So I would suggest that you take care of it by releasing a patch.

At later time I think I will collect patches and commit to apsfilter.

Best regards
Andreas
----- End forwarded message -----
